title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China revealed JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid with a split AI brain architecture for real-time thinking and perception. Vietnam introduced two humanoid platforms: the Dyno robot for security and service, and VR-H3 for industrial applications. NVIDIA released Isaac GR00T, an open reference platform with Unitree H2 and Jetson Thor featuring two thousand teraflops of onboard compute.
